section_title: Power of Court to stay winding up.-- The Court may, at any time after an order for winding up, on the application of
content:
253. Power of Court to stay winding up.-- The Court may, at any time after an order for winding up, on the application of
any creditor or contributor, and on proof to the satisfaction of the Court that all proceedings in relation to the winding up
ought to be stayed, make an order staying the proceedings, either altogether or for a limited time, on such terms and
conditions as the Court thinks fit.
